pi_items.source: task.json description field (line 5): 'Sales Representative: Name=NestWell Sales'
task.json description field (line 5): 'Customer Support: Name=NestWell Help Team'
task.json description field (line 6): 'Add manager@nestwell.local to Send Order Email Copy To'

task.json description (line 6): Set 'New Order Confirmation Email Sender' to 'Customer Support'. The 'support' identity corresponds to the Customer Support sender in Magento config path trans_email/ident_support.

task.json description (line 6): Set 'Invoice Email Sender' to 'Sales Representative'. The 'sales' identity corresponds to the Sales Representative sender in Magento config path trans_email/ident_sales.
task.json description (line 6): Set 'Send Emails To' to 'support@nestwell.local'
task.json description (line 6): Set Contact 'Email Sender' to 'Customer Support'. The 'support' identity is used for this configuration.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Magento transactional email identities with two sender identities: 'NestWell Sales' (sales@nestwell.local) and 'NestWell Help Team' (support@nestwell.local). Order confirmations are sent from the support identity, invoices from the sales identity, and contact form emails are sent to support@nestwell.local from the support identity. A copy of order emails is sent to manager@nestwell.local. All configuration values correspond to specific Magento core_config_data entries (trans_email/ident_sales/*, trans_email/ident_support/*, sales_email/order/*, sales_email/invoice/*, contact/email/*).
